cases.prompt: 내 노트들로 베이스 만들어줘, 테이블 뷰로 보고 싶어.

assertions.text: The skill creates a new .base file for the user's notes.
The created base includes a table view as requested.
The output uses valid Obsidian Bases configuration with views and filters.

cases.prompt: Edit my .base file to add a card view and a formula column.

assertions.text: The skill edits the existing .base file rather than creating an unrelated note.
The edit adds a card view to the base.
The edit adds an Obsidian base formula column.

cases.prompt: I want a note database with filters and a summary row.

assertions.text: The skill builds a .base file functioning as a note database.
The base includes filters and a summary row as requested.
